meta_description: Order custom 3D prints built from a wide range of thermoset resins. Further enhance cosmetics with several post-processing capabilities.

sections.heading: Resin 3D Printing Service
sections.text: Resin 3D Printing Service Order custom 3D prints built from a wide range of thermoset resins. Get Instant Quote

sections.heading: Resin 3D Printing Technologies
sections.text: Resin 3D Printing Technologies Stereolithography (SLA) Stereolithography (SLA) uses an ultraviolet laser to cure a thermoset resin until the 3D-printed part is formed. SLA is a good choice for cosmetic parts due to smooth surface finishes and fine feature detail. View SLA Capabilities arrow_right_alt PolyJet PolyJet uses a jetting process where small droplets of liquid photopolymer onto a build platform and cured in layers that form elastomeric parts. PolyJet can print parts with multiple colors and hardnesses. View PolyJet Capabilities arrow_right_alt Carbon DLS Carbon DLS uses digital light projection, oxygen permeable optics, and programmable liquid resins to produce plastic parts with r...

sections.heading: Our Resin 3D Printers
sections.text: Our Resin 3D Printers Our 3D printing facility houses a variety of resin 3D printers to support various material options, build volumes, and resolutions (normal, high, and micro). Stereolithography: 3D Systems Viper, ProJet 6000s, ProJet 7000, iPro8000, and ProX 800s PolyJet: Objet260, Connex3, Objet350, and Objet500 Connex3 Carbon: M2

sections.heading: Key Resources on Resin 3D Printing
sections.text: Key Resources on Resin 3D Printing Resin 3D Printing: Use Cases and Key Benefits Resin 3D printing describes a subset of manufacturing technologies that additively build parts by curing liquid resin.
